notes: These thresholds are initial engineering defaults, not scientific constants or ability-level claims.
Changing thresholds requires a ruleConfigVersion bump and must be recorded in detail_json.ruleConfigVersion.
Hash calculation uses canonical JSON and excludes self-referential hash fields such as *_hash and *Hash.
v2.2 adds PAGE_IDLE; compliant idle requires page_visible=true and window_focused=true.

textThrottleCharDelta.description: Minimum character delta for throttled text-change analysis.

fluidMinPositiveDelta.description: Minimum positive character delta for GENERATE_FLUID.

fluidMinDurationMs.description: Minimum duration for a fluent text-generation segment.

textBlurMinChar.description: Minimum character count for effective TEXT_BLUR evidence.

editDistanceThreshold.description: Minimum edit distance for revision evidence.

engineeringRepeatWindowMs.description: Exact duplicate engineering event suppression window.

minMeaningfulDwellMs.description: Minimum dwell time for meaningful material viewing.

chartHoverMinMs.description: Minimum chart hover duration for CHART_INSPECT.

expRunDebounceMs.description: Duplicate experiment-run suppression threshold for identical parameters.

pageHiddenAdjustEnabled.description: Whether hidden-page duration can be excluded from effective duration.

usePriorExp.description: Whether Page09-Page11 can read prior Page08 experiment context.

pageIdleThresholdMs.description: Minimum visible-and-focused no-effective-interaction duration for compliant PAGE_IDLE.
